message:
fix(mvcc): initialize BOCPD newborn run stats with observation; clean up shm.rs

BOCPD changepoint detector: when spawning a new "changepoint run" (run
length 0), the conjugate-model sufficient statistics were initialized
empty via NormalGammaStats::new() / BetaBinomialStats::new(). This
meant the first observation that triggered the changepoint was not
incorporated into the newborn run's statistics, causing the run's
predictive distribution to diverge from reality for its first step.
Fix by chaining .update(x) onto the new stats so the triggering
observation is included.

shm.rs formatting and cleanup:
- Remove unused AtomicU32 import (only AtomicU64 is used).
- Reformat long compare_exchange call chains and assert_eq! calls
  in tests to comply with rustfmt line-length limits.
- Fix boolean expression line-breaking style in torn-read detection
  (|| at line start instead of trailing &&).
- Remove assertion for _align1 padding field that was deleted from
  the layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
